registry_scope: Admissible-Existence subject repositories mirrored as formalism records.
authority_boundary: This registry mirrors and classifies formalism records from Admissible-Existence subject repositories. It does not create source authority, proof authority, execution authority, continuity standing, or admissibility standing.

records.name: STCM
records.purpose: Mirror the STCM subject formalism for public comparison, crosswalk, and convergence review.
non_claims: Wiki mirroring does not make STCM a StegVerse source authority.
Wiki mirroring does not prove or validate STCM claims.

records.name: Runtime Transition Governance
records.purpose: Mirror public-safe metadata for Runtime Transition Governance and connect runtime checks to transition posture, authority, policy, boundary, evidence, and receipt review.
records.transition_relationship: runtime transition governance canonical detail page installed; source-confirmed proof and validation extraction pending
non_claims: Wiki mirroring must not expose private Runtime Transition Governance source content.
Wiki mirroring does not define, prove, or validate Runtime Transition Governance claims.
